heading: Nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: furnishing utility services for morale, welfare, and recreation purposes
label: 2494 Nonappropriated fund instrumentalities: furnishing utility services for morale, welfare, and recreation purposes
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2494 was renumbered .section 2491 of this title

children.text: buildings on military installations authorized by regulation to be used for morale, welfare, and recreation purposes; and
other morale, welfare, and recreation activities for members of the armed forces.
